creator: eric+fbports@vangyzen.net
text:
The [revised] patch works well; please commit it.

I would not bother removing the symlinks in share/nls.

Thanks for your work, Vittorio!

Cheers,

Eric

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of math/R,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/104261 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104261
